mainEntity.name: What is the difference between AEO and SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO and SEO overlap, but they are not identical. SEO focuses more on rankings and traffic, while AEO focuses on making content easy to quote, extract, and present as a direct answer in search and AI systems.
acceptedAnswer.description: SEO is about ranking pages; AEO is about being chosen as the direct answer. Strong AEO usually builds on good SEO, but the content structure and proof requirements are more specific.
